titleStmt.title: SII 23.485: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 485. (A.R. No. 485 of 1907.) Kuttālam, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Uttaravēdīśvara temple—on the north wall of the central shrine Rājēndra-Chōḷa I: year 9: 1021-22 A.D.

summary.p: This begins with the introduction Tīrumannivaḷara etc. It records the sale of land and house site by the sabhā of Kaṇakkaiyūr alias Kāmakkamaṅgalam in Pērāvūr-nāḍu a division of Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu to the temple of Māhādēva of Vīṅgunīr-Tirutturutti in Tiruvaḻundūr-nāḍu for 75 kāśu inclusive of the capital for payment of taxes by the sabhā on behalf of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumanni vaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟceyappāvaiyum cirttanic celviyum tan perunteviyarāki Inpuṟa neṭu tuyaruḻi Iliṭaituṟaināṭum tuṭarvanavelippaṭar vanavāciyum cuḷḷiccūḻmatiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭa liḻattaraiyar tamuṭiyum Āṅkavarteviyaroṅkeḻil muṭiyum munna var pakkaṟ ṟennavar vaitta cuntaramuṭiyum Intira nāṟamum teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷan muṟaimai
yiṟcūṭum kulatanamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ ceṅkatir velait tol peruṅkāval palapaḻantivum ceruviṟcinavil Irupatto rukā laraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāman mevaruñ cānti maṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻi mika mucaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta ceyaciṅkan Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭum piṭiya liraṭṭa pāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum navanetikkula
pperumalaikaḷum māpperun taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecari patmarāna Uṭaiyār śrīrājendracoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 1Āvatu Uyyakkoṇ ṭār vaḷanāṭṭup perāvūr nāṭṭu brahmadeyam kaṇakkaiyūrāṉa kāmakkac caturvetimaṅkalattuc cavaiyom Eṅkaḷūr Ampalattey ni ntu kūṭṭaṅ kuṟaivaṟakkūṭi Iruntu viṟṟukkuṭutta nila
vilaiyāvaṇam Innāṭṭut tiruvaḻuntūr nāṭṭu viṅkunirt tirutturutti Uṭaiya mahādevaṟku śrīkāriyam ceykinṟa caṇṭeśvaradevaṟku nāṅ kaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷ śrīvativāykkāl damikaṉ sabhaiyom nilam kāle kāṇiyum Innilam kālekāṇikku kiḻpāṟ kellai Ivvāykkālukke meṟkum
ṭṭattukkuk kiḻakku kamukantoṭṭa kamukantoṭṭattukku teṉ pāṟkellai vāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai vallavaraiyar llai māṭilaṉ nārāyaṇantoṭṭattukku teṟkum Ivvicainta peru nāṉkellaiyuḷḷum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam kālekāṇiyum Ituvallatu Innam Ittevarkke viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Ūrin tennūr Ava ninārāyaṇa vāykkālin tenkarai Eṅkaḷ nilam taṭi Iraṇṭināl nilam Arai Innilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai pattāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu vāy kkālukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai muppirāl Anantanārāyaṇa kṛmavittan nilattukkum vaṅkippuṟattu sakarappottu somayakkirama vittan brāhmaṇa nilattukku vaṭakkum
mel pāṟkellai Ācūri śrīvāsudevakkiramavittan brāhmaṇa nilattu kku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Anantanārāyaṇavāykkālukkut teṟkum Āka Ivvicaitta perunānkellaiyuḷḷu naṭuvupaṭṭa taṭii raṇṭināl nilam Arai Innilam Ivvirucāya taṭi munṟināl vanta nilam mukkāle kāṇi Innilam mukkāle kāṇiyum mikutikkuṟaimai yuḷḷaṭaṅka Uṇṇilam Oḻivinṟi viṟṟukkuṭuttu Innam Ittevaṟke viṟṟukkuṭutta manaiyāvatu Eṅkaḷur melaiteruvil miciṟakil sabhai yomitāyk kiṭanta manai Onṟukkuṅ kiḻpāṟkellai mokiliyan sūryen Udayadivākaranum tampimārum manaikku vaṭakku melpāṟ kellai manaiy Aṟutikku kiḻakku
vaṭapāṟkellai komaṭattu cattiyakkiramavittan manaikku teṟkum Āka Ivvicaitta peru nāṉ kellai Uḷ naṭuvu paṭṭa manai Onṟu ke Iraṇṭemukkāl kol Akalaṅkoṇṭu meṟkunokki manai Aṟuti Aḷavum cellavanta manai Uḷḷatellā mu lan Onṟum muṟcuṭṭappaṭṭa nilam taṭimunṟināl vanta nilam mukkāle kāṇiyum Innilam mukkāle kāṇiyum viṟṟuk kuṭuttuk koṇṭa vilaipporuḷk kācu Eḻupattañcu Ikkācu Eḻupattañcum Iccaṇṭeśvaratevar paṇṭārattut tevakanmikaḷ vāṅki tantu sabhaiyom koṇṭu Innilaṅkaḷ Ittevaṟku cantrādityavaṟ Ittevaṟku viṟṟukkuṭuttu Innilaṅkaḷukku Iṟaiyum Eccoṟum maṟṟum Ūriṭu varippāṭu
Epperpaṭṭatum Innilam Uḻutakuṭikaḷe Epperpaṭṭa veṭṭiveti naiyum kāṭṭap peṟātomākavum Ipparicu In nilaṅkaḷukku sabhai yome Iṟaiyiṟukka tevar Iṟaiyiliye Amutu ceyyap peṟuvatāka vu kaḷukku Ikkācu Eḻupattañcum Innilattukku vilaipporuḷuk kum Iṟaiyilikkumākak koṇṭu Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytu kuṭuttom tirutturutti Uṭaiya mahādetevaṟkku śrīkāriyañ ceykiṟa caṇḍeśvaradevarkku kaṇakkaiyūrākiya kāmakkamaṅkalattu sabhai yom sabhaiyuḷḷum maṟṟum nilam taṭiyum Innilaṅ ccuṭṭi Ūriṭu varippāṭum Iṟaiyum meccoṟum veṭṭivetinaiyum kāṭṭin[ārai yum kāṭṭappaṇittāraiyum paṇike
ṭṭāraiyum kāvi ṇakar tevakanmikaḷum śrīmā koṇṭuṅ kaḷa ttu tām veṇṭu peṟuvatākavum manṟiyum Innilaṅkaḷ Itte var Iṟaiyili Amutuceyya yomey Iṟaiyiṟuttuk kuṭukkakkaṭa vomākavum Innilaṅkaḷ pa yum vaṇṇame pāyavum vāravum peṟu vatākavum Āka Ipparicu sabhaiyuḷ Iruṅkaṇṭi viṣṇutatta kramavitta rum kuravacari mākāḷi kramavittaṉum virucātūr Āccapiṭāra kramavit tarum Iruṅkaṇṭi tettakramavitta Ivvūr veṇṇaikākavaṉum viru sātūr śrīkaṇṭarāvanum śrīkāri vaṅkippuṟattu sakarappotta somaya kiramavittanum
Āka Ivvaṉaivarum paṇippaṇiyālp paṇikeṭṭu Ippiramāṇam Ipparicu tirutturutti Uṭaiya [mahā]devar koyilil kallil veṭṭik koḷḷappeṟuvārāka pattan veṇkāṭan nāṟpatteṇmanen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven pāntūr śrīkaṇṭarāvanen Ippaṭi Aṟiven Otimukkil ṣi kecavarāvanen Ippaṭi Aṟiven Ivvūr vaikāsanan gautaman caṅkaranārāyaṇan tiruvoṇa ttiyen Ippaṭi Aṟiven kuravaciri kumarakāḷi rāvanen Ippaṭi Aṟive
n Iruṅkaṇṭi ke nen Ippaṭi Aṟiven vaikaāsanan comāci nārāyaṇan tiruveṅkaṭaStops here.
Digital edition of SII 23.485 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
